047        this.param1 = param1;
048        this.param2 = param2;
049        this.param3 = param3;

067        raw = removeSignedRequestHmacBytes(raw);
068        Validate.isTrue(raw.length == props().size());
069        this.cargo = raw;
070        this.param1 = Bytes.readUint32(raw, 0);
071        this.param2 = Bytes.readUint32(raw, 4);

073        this.param4 = Bytes.readUint32(raw, 12);
074        this.param5 = Bytes.readUint32(raw, 16);
075        this.param6 = Bytes.readUint32(raw, 20);
076    }

078    /**

091     * <tr><td>9</td><td><code>toUint32(param3) [byte 1]</code></td></tr>

093     * <tr><td>11</td><td><code>toUint32(param3) [byte 3]</code></td></tr>
094     * <tr><td>12</td><td><code>toUint32(param4) [byte 0]</code></td></tr>
095     * <tr><td>13</td><td><code>toUint32(param4) [byte 1]</code></td></tr>
096     * <tr><td>14</td><td><code>toUint32(param4) [byte 2]</code></td></tr>
097     * <tr><td>15</td><td><code>toUint32(param4) [byte 3]</code></td></tr>

101     * <tr><td>19</td><td><code>toUint32(param5) [byte 3]</code></td></tr>
102     * <tr><td>20</td><td><code>toUint32(param6) [byte 0]</code></td></tr>
103     * <tr><td>21</td><td><code>toUint32(param6) [byte 1]</code></td></tr>
104     * <tr><td>22</td><td><code>toUint32(param6) [byte 2]</code></td></tr>

108    public static byte[] buildCargo(long param1, long param2, long param3, long param4, long param5, long param6) {
109        return Bytes.combine(
110            Bytes.toUint32(param1),
111            Bytes.toUint32(param2),
112            Bytes.toUint32(param3),
113            Bytes.toUint32(param4),
114            Bytes.toUint32(param5),
115            Bytes.toUint32(param6)
116        );
117    }
